name: Weight Watchers Chicken Cordon Bleu
recipeIngredient: 2 Slices each reduced calorie swiss cheese
1/2 oz each turkey ham and cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375F. Top each chicken cutlet with 1 slice turkey ham and 1 slice cheese, starting from the narrow end. Roll each cutlet jelly-roll style and secure with a toothpick.
2. In a small mixing bowl, combine 1 tablespoon mustard and 1 teaspoon honey; spread half of the mixture evenly over each chicken roll.
3. On a sheet of waxed paper, arrange bread crumbs. Turn chicken rolls in bread crumbs, coating all sides and using all of the bread crumbs. Arrange chicken rolls on a non-stick cooking sheet and drizzle each with 1 teaspoon oil. Bake until chicken is cooked through, about 20-25 minutes.
4. While baking chicken, prepare sauce. In a small saucepan, combine broth and flour; stir to dissolve flour. Cook over medium-high heat, stirring frequently, until the mixture thickens, about 3-4 minutes. Reduce heat to low and stir in sour cream and remaining mustard. Cook, stirring occasionally, for another 3-4 minutes.
5. To serve, remove toothpicks and cut each chicken roll crosswise into 4 equal slices. On each of 2 serving plates, pour half of the sauce and top with four chicken roll slices.
